caption: Hope everyone had a lovely holiday!
@rarebeauty to go
forever begins now..

A little something sweet 🍑 I’m so excited to share the newest scent in @rarebeauty’s Find Comfort body collection. This one is called Awaken Confidence! It smells soo delicious—think juicy peach and fresh flower blossom.

It comes in both a body mist and a BRAND-NEW Bouncy Body Cream. I love the deep hydration body creams give but found a lot of them felt super sticky, so I wanted to change that. I seriously can’t wait for you all to try it. Both the mist and body cream will launch Dec. 12 @sephora (early on the app on Dec. 11), Sephora @kohls, @spacenk, and RareBeauty.com
Thank you SO much Colleen Camp for hosting and to my friend Meryl for celebrating @emiliaperezfilm - not me casually saying my friend Meryl 😂 it’s Meryl Streep!! My idol,  dream

Ok sorry for another one lol but I have to thank Paul Rudd and @theperfectmagazine for an amazing shoot and interview! It was one of my favorite shoots!!.

Emilia Pérez is out now on Netflix in the US, UK and Canada! Jacques Audiard’s audacious fever dream defies genres and expectations 💕
snap shots this week 💜
Bringing back my childhood has been such a beautiful gift.. I hope you all can enjoy this beautiful project that was made with so much love. PS. Our pilot show used to be called something else. 💜🪄
Curiouser and curiouser..

What a wonderful night! I was honored to host the annual Rare Impact Fund Benefit yesterday for the second year in LA. This is the why @rarebeauty has changed my life but millions of others through work we all have done together. I have so much gratitude for those who came, listened and contributed! 

Being in a room filled with people united by the same goals surrounding mental health gives me so much hope and reminds me why we started all of this in the first place. Thank you to the @rarebeauty team and everyone who made this possible-@rarebeauty @karolg @teddyswims @sephora @pinterest @betterhelp @uclahealth @pacsun @officialwondermind @universalmusicgroup @cncinternational.official @kokoro.change @theguptagroup @katespadeny @lighthousemm @sonyanimation @shesmaad @nyastudios + Billy Crudup

Here’s to expanding mental health resources for young people around the world 💕 love you all and THANK YOU
Reflecting on the many adventures working on Emilia.. from my audition to head banging at half the speed as what we shot it. Pretty sure I got whiplash in the best way.

My incredible friend @staceyabrams and I had the chance to produce LOUDER: The Soundtrack of Change which is out TODAY on @streamonmax. Thank you so much to everyone who worked on this project and to the women who shared their experiences.

When I started @RareBeauty, I set out to create a brand that celebrates you—*every* side of you. I’m honored to launch this new campaign as a reminder that you are beautiful, you are special, and you are always worthy of love. ​
​
To be Rare is to love every you. Love your rare.
London
